iree_add_all_subdirs()

  NAME
    amdgpu_executable_test_kernels
  TARGET
    amdgcn-amd-amdhsa
  TARGETS
    ${IREE_HAL_AMDGPU_TARGETS}
  BINARY_NAME_PREFIX
    hrx_cts_executable_kernel
  C_FILE_OUTPUT
    "amdgpu_executable_test_kernels.c"
  H_FILE_OUTPUT
    "amdgpu_executable_test_kernels.h"
  IDENTIFIER
    "hrx_cts_amdgpu_executable_test_kernels"
  SRCS
    "tests/executable/executable_kernels.c"
  TESTONLY
  PUBLIC
)

iree_cc_library(
  NAME
    core
  COPTS
    "-fexceptions"
  HDRS
    "core/hrx_loader.hpp"
    "core/hrx_test_fixture.hpp"
  SRCS
    "core/hrx_loader.cpp"
    "core/main.cpp"
  DEPS
    ${CMAKE_DL_LIBS}
    iree::third_party::catch2
    libhrx_defs
  INCLUDES
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../include>"
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/../include>"
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/core>"
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/core>"
  PUBLIC
)
